# Bounty Hunter Documentation

## Overview

This directory contains documentation for the OpenClaw Bounty Hunter system.

## Quick Start

1. Clone the workspace
2. Read MEMORY.md for core instructions
3. Check DAILy-LOG for current tasks

## Files

- `MEMORY.md` - Core instructions and task status
- `DAILY-LOG-*.md` - Daily execution logs
- `HEARTBEAT.md` - Heartbeat check instructions

## Contributing

1. Read existing docs
2. Make your changes
3. Submit PR
